questions.question: Where does fairy ring AIQ go to?
questions.answer: Near mogres, anvil, altar, Rimmington, Port Sarim, Asgarnian Ice Dungeon.

questions.question: What location does fairy ring code AIP teleport you to?
What location does fairy ring code AJR teleport you to?
questions.answer: Kandarin: Slayer cave south-east of Rellekka (Fremennik Slayer Dungeon)

questions.question: What location does fairy ring code AKQ teleport you to?
What location does fairy ring code AKS teleport you to?
What location does fairy ring code ALQ teleport you to?
questions.answer: Morytania: Haunted Woods east of Canifis
